testcase.name: test_endpoint_returns_fallback_when_key_missing

skipped.message: Live AI succeeded; cannot exercise fallback via env swap from test process (supervisor backend uses its own env). Direct helper test in TestFallbackHelper covers this path.

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_iter4_fallback.py:134: Live AI succeeded; cannot exercise fallback via env swap from test process (supervisor backend uses its own env). Direct helper test in TestFallbackHelper covers this path.
